name: Stanley M. Bergman
title: Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer
description: Leads the overall strategic direction and operations of Henry Schein as its long-tenured CEO and Chairman.

name: Ronald N. South
title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
description: Oversees the company's financial operations, reporting, and planning.

name: James P. Breslawski
title: Vice Chairman and President, Henry Schein One
description: Provides executive leadership for Henry Schein's dental technology and services business unit.

name: Gerald A. Benjamin
title: Executive Vice President, Chief Administrative Officer and Director of International Relations
description: Manages administrative functions and international business relationships across the enterprise.

name: Michael S. Ettinger
title: Executive Vice President, Chief of Staff and Corporate Secretary
description: Supports executive leadership coordination and manages corporate governance and legal affairs.

name: Lorelei McGlynn
title: Senior Vice President, Chief Human Resources Officer
description: Leads global human resources strategy, talent acquisition, and employee development.

name: Brad Connett
title: President, U.S. Medical Group
description: Leads the U.S. medical distribution and services business segment.

name: Mark E. Mlotek
title: Executive Vice President, Chief Strategic Officer
description: Drives corporate strategy, mergers and acquisitions, and strategic partnerships.

name: Steven Paladino
title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
description: Previously served as CFO overseeing financial strategy and reporting for the company.

name: Walter Siegel
title: Senior Vice President and Chief Legal Officer
description: Oversees legal affairs, compliance, and regulatory matters across the organization.
